Name: tinyslash
Description:
TinySlash — Free URL Shortener, QR Code Generator & Link-in-Bio Pages

TinySlash is a link management platform that helps businesses, marketers, and creators shorten URLs, generate QR codes, share files via link, and build link-in-bio pages — all from one dashboard.

We built TinySlash because online sharing shouldn't be complicated. Long, messy URLs break trust. Untracked links waste marketing budgets. Scattered tools slow teams down. TinySlash solves all three.

What you can do with TinySlash:
→ Short Links — Turn long URLs into clean, branded short links with real-time click tracking, geographic analytics, and device breakdowns.
→ QR Codes — Generate static and dynamic QR codes for products, menus, events, business cards, and marketing campaigns. Download in PNG, SVG, or JPG.
→ File-to-Link — Upload any file and instantly get a shareable short link. No cloud storage setup needed.
→ Pages — Build link-in-bio landing pages to showcase all your links, social profiles, and content in one place. Perfect for Instagram creators, small businesses, and personal brands.
→ Analytics — Track every click with detailed insights on location, referrer, device, and browser. Know exactly what's working.

TinySlash is built for digital marketers managing campaigns, small businesses replacing Bitly and Linktree, social media managers handling multiple brands, and individual creators who want one link for everything.

Free to start. No credit card required.
tinyslash.com

Name: High Castle Holdings
Description:
“Why is it so hard to find a music studio?” 

“Is a music studio a bad place for kids?”

“How profitable can the music industry be?”

These questions peppered our ears for YEARS since we ran our own music studio back in 2017. 

Music studios are one of the most fundamental stakeholders in the grassroots of the music industry. This is the place where ANYONE can experiment on their musical creativity without limits and criticisms from the public. This is the place where they are reborn as artists and musicians.

However, music studios often face the lack of scalability in business and also lack of protection from musicians who may have negligently damaged the studios' musical equipments. These issues poses a threat to their sustainability and if they can't survive, it would mean the death of a key stakeholder in the music industry and the slow death of the music industry. 

We eventually brainstormed on how we can assist improve the business scalability of music studios by providing ease of access for customers, musicians, students, kids, educators, the middle class, the working class, the B40 or anyone who is interested in expressing their creativity through music, to connect to music studios. We also have safeguards in place to protect studio owners from unnecessary business losses. 

We believe that through our efforts, we will be able to cultivate a change of culture and environment in the music industry where support from each other is not begged for, but given without any hope of reciprocation. Any kind of change is possible with the right ideas, execution and empowerment, and that is our main goal, to empower stakeholders and key players in the music industry in order to push for greater output and quality of life in the music industry.

Name: Filmo
Description:
Filmo is a global live shopping and social commerce platform for fashion, beauty and luxury vintage brands. It operates across North America, Europe, Asia, Australia and the Middle East, connecting Meta and e-commerce into a single, commerce-grade system designed to convert video into revenue.

Filmo was built around a consistent gap in the market: brands were already producing livestreams, try-ons and styling content across Instagram, Facebook and their own sites, yet conversion remained manual and fragmented. Most solutions either made one channel shoppable and left the rest as content, or created a second store with disconnected inventory, reporting and operations. The result was predictable: buyer friction, weak attribution and an internal workload that scaled faster than sales.

Filmo solves this by adding a live-shopping layer on top of social and the existing store. From one environment, teams can plan shows, run live operations and drive checkout. Meta lives and replays become shoppable from the first “shop” comment through to order, while a single e-commerce backend keeps products, orders and inventory aligned across social, the brand site and the Filmo marketplace.

Our focus is straightforward: help brands turn live and replay video into a measurable, repeatable revenue channel, with the same level of control, attribution and reliability expected from the online store and paid media.

Filmo is female-founded and built by operators with deep experience across marketplaces, product and growth, supporting live commerce teams across North America, Europe, Asia, Australia and the Middle East.

Download Filmo: https://linktr.ee/filmo.app

Microsoft 365, Azure, Copilot, Entra, Defender - these platforms underpin how modern organisations operate. Description:
Fluenceur est une plateforme française d'affiliation sociale. Elle permet aux marques e-commerce de transformer leurs clients et créateurs en affiliés - rémunérés uniquement à la vente.

Le modèle est simple : vous ne payez pas pour des posts. Vous rémunérez des ventes réelles, générées par des créateurs qui parlent de votre marque et des clients qui la recommandent.

Au cœur de la plateforme, un compagnon IA qui travaille à partir de l'ADN de votre marque. Il analyse votre positionnement, votre voix et votre audience pour construire un profil BrandDNA unique. 

À partir de là, il recherche parmi 10M+ profils créateurs en langage naturel, évalue la compatibilité de chaque créateur avec votre marque, interprète vos KPIs, génère des graphiques de performance et répond à vos questions sur n'importe quel affilié en quelques secondes. C'est un vrai assistant qui s'adapte à votre marque - pas un moteur de recherche avec des filtres.

La plateforme automatise ensuite l'ensemble du cycle :

- Social listening : chaque mention détectée automatiquement avec les données d'engagement
- Workflows visuels (Flows) pour automatiser onboarding, cadeaux, commissions et paliers de récompense
- Tracking et attribution des ventes par lien unique
Paiements et facturation automatisés
- Co-publicité : boostez le contenu créateur en Partnership Ads directement depuis la plateforme

Réservez une démo sur www.fluenceur.com

Name: CallPayMin
Description:
At CallPayMin, we believe that time is the most valuable currency. Every day, experts, professionals, coaches, and creators receive calls, messages, and requests for advice — but there has never been a seamless way to monetize those moments of attention. That’s where CallPayMin comes in.

CallPayMin is a pay-per-minute audio and video calling platform that enables experts to turn conversations into income and seekers to access real, live expertise when they need it most. With just a custom link, anyone can connect, start a call, and pay securely by the minute. No invoices. No missed value. Just simple, fair, instant monetization.

Our platform integrates Twilio for high-quality video and audio, Stripe for secure global payments and auto-recharge, and Firebase for fast, reliable authentication and data handling. Whether you are a consultant, fitness coach, lawyer, influencer, or mentor, CallPayMin gives you a dashboard to track earnings, call history, and payouts in real time.

For seekers, it’s about on-demand access to the right expert without the complexity of contracts or subscriptions. For experts, it’s about controlling your availability, setting your own rate, and being compensated fairly for your time and knowledge.

 Who we serve:
	•	Consultants and advisors across industries
	•	Coaches and trainers (fitness, career, life, business)
	•	Creators and influencers who want to offer direct access
	•	Businesses that need subject-matter experts on demand

 Why now: The global market for expert advice, creator monetization, and on-demand coaching is worth billions and growing rapidly. CallPayMin is building the infrastructure for the next wave of “knowledge commerce,” where every call can create value for both sides.

Our mission is simple: make every call count — and pay.

Name: LinkSpree
Description:
LinkSpree is an AI-powered platform that transforms ordinary links into intelligent, visual dashboards. Instead of storing URLs in cluttered bookmarks or spreadsheets, LinkSpree organizes them into structured systems that help you access, manage, and share information more effectively.

At its core, LinkSpree turns links into actionable tools. Users can organize links into customizable dashboards using icons, colors, tags, and hierarchy to create clear visual structures. Features like reminders, alerts, and disclaimers add context and accountability to each link, ensuring important resources are revisited and not forgotten.

LinkSpree also introduces interactive avatars that live on your dashboards. These characters evolve with your tags and activity, adding personality and visual cues to your collections. Tags can unlock accessories or changes in the avatars, making dashboards more engaging and easier to navigate.

With built-in AI capabilities, LinkSpree can provide insights, assist with discovery, and help users explore new resources through integrated web search. The platform also enables users to discover dashboards created by others and instantly import them into their own workspace, creating a growing ecosystem of curated knowledge hubs.

Dashboards can easily be shared through links or export codes, making LinkSpree useful for creators, professionals, teams, and event organizers. A single dashboard can function as a powerful link-in-bio, a productivity system, a team resource hub, or an event information portal.

By combining organization, automation, discovery, and AI insights, LinkSpree turns collections of links into intelligent systems that help people work smarter, share better, and unlock the full potential of the web.

At Fonjible, we believe that payments should do more than just transfer money; they should foster lasting connections between people and the brands they love. 

Our Mission is to empower businesses to grow cash flow and customer retention by turning every transaction into a rewarding connection through data-driven technology. 

Core Offerings:
1. Loyalty-as-a-Service (LaaS): We provide a cloud-based platform for businesses to create, launch, and manage custom Tap-to-Pay loyalty and gift card programs with minimal operational overhead. 
2. Fonjible Tap-to-Pay Cards: Physical and digital assets that allow users to automatically earn points, discounts, or cash-back at the point of sale—no extra apps or complicated steps required. 
3. Unified Rewards Ecosystem: A single mobile application where users can discover local brands, track their rewards in real-time, and manage all their loyalty assets in one place.

Value for Businesses: 
We help multi-branch retailers, cafes, and service brands boost customer spending and secure upfront revenue. By providing real-time analytics and automated rewards tracking, we enable businesses to reduce churn and build a predictable cycle of growth. 

Value for Shoppers:
Fonjible makes loyalty feel like a lifestyle. Every tap is a "thank you" moment, giving everyday consumers access to better deals and personalized recognition without the hassle of paper cards or lost receipts. 

Whether you are a business looking to build smarter customer relationships or a shopper who wants more value for every Naira spent, welcome to Fonjible; Where loyalty is rewarded.

Launched in 2023, Treea is a revolutionary new rewards platform, that pays you when you buy from decarbonising businesses. The lower their carbon footprint, the greater your reward! 

As creators of the Sustainability-Pegged Rewards category, Treea leads a new breed of marketing, for the new breed of consumer that demands greener, replacing the greyness of sustainability with colour through carbon data.

Companies that partner with Treea unlock a new tier of value for their customers by virtue of their own decarbonisation efforts, helping them win and retain more business the greener they become. 

Join us in driving the E-commerce industry of tomorrow and start leveraging your decarbonisation for commercial advantage today! 

info@treea.co.uk

*How does Treea work?*

Treea pays you money back when you buy from decarbonising companies. The greater their Sustainability Score, the greater your cash reward when you spend with them. Not only do you benefit financially from the rewards you earn, but your engagement with Treea actively encourages your favourite brands to decarbonise, positioning you and your purchasing decisions as the catalyst to this change!

Treea brings to light sustainability data and we present it in an easily understandable format, that helps develop your emissions knowledge and understanding. We help you to identify those companies operating most and least sustainably in their given sector. If you've ever been left wondering: "How sustainable is this company really?"- as long they are a Treea partner - you will have an immediate indication through our emissions breakdowns and sustainability scoring analysis.

When you shop using Treea, you help validate the commercial argument to decision makers within companies around the world, as they begin to realise that they can better win and retain your custom the more sustainable they become!

Name: CINAFORUM
Description:
www.cinaforum.net è un portale di informazione e approfondimento sulla Cina contemporanea. Nato nel febbraio 2014, cinaforum pubblica notizie, fornisce strumenti di lettura e uno spazio libero di dibattito.

Dove porterà l’urbanizzazione senza precedenti nella storia intrapresa dalla Cina? Pechino favorirà lo sviluppo di un nuovo ordine internazionale multipolare? Il Partito comunista riuscirà a riformarsi e a governare una società sempre più diversificata? Quale rapporto l’Italia costruirà con la Repubblica popolare cinese?

Su queste e altre problematiche ci interroghiamo avvalendoci del contributo di studiosi, esperti e giornalisti.

Un misto di scetticismo e timore accompagna l’ascesa della Cina. Sentimenti esacerbati dalla perdita del primato delle economie avanzate e dalla rapidità e portata delle trasformazioni in corso in Asia, Africa e America latina.

Sforzarsi di comprendere senza pregiudizi dove va la Cina è importante, perché, in un’epoca di globalizzazione dei mercati e delle conoscenze, il risveglio – non privo di acute contraddizioni – di una nazione da 1 miliardo e 300 milioni di abitanti già influenza il futuro di tutti noi.

Name: CognitionHub
Description:
Cognition Hub enables organizations to deploy agentic AI in days by providing production-ready infrastructure.

We were established on the belief that production AI demands purpose-built infrastructure, not improvised solutions. Built on proven production deployment experience, our team is passionate about eliminating infrastructure barriers and enabling organizations to build AI-native products at scale.

What distinguishes Cognition Hub is HiveOS: the complete intelligence operating system for production AI. We deliver pre-built infrastructure that replaces custom engineering efforts. Whether serving organizations requiring secure AI deployment, SaaS platforms embedding persistent intelligence, or PE portfolios driving standardized transformation, we provide the foundation that enables teams to focus on their product, not infrastructure.

The cornerstone of our platform is solving critical challenges that prevent AI from reaching production: vendor lock-in through model-agnostic architecture, stateless memory through persistent knowledge systems, operational complexity through self-healing orchestration, and integration friction through standardized connectivity. HiveOS transforms how businesses adopt AI from experimental pilots to production systems.

Cognition Hub's mission remains steadfast: to democratize production AI infrastructure so any organization can build the intelligent systems that define competitive advantage. For organizations ready to deploy AI-native products, Cognition Hub provides the operating system that makes it possible.

FreshEyes — a data intelligence division turning contextual data into market insights for corporates and partners.

Ideahack — our AI-powered innovation engine that rapidly develops and validates new digital solutions for African challenges.

Sisonke — a community marketing and social commerce platform that bridges digital engagement with local relationships.

Through these connected platforms, we create new pathways for inclusion, innovation, and market access — powered by AI, driven by partnerships, and grounded in Africa’s realities.

At Consumatech, we are not just digitizing Africa; we are digitizing Africa’s local contexts — making them visible, connected, and valuable in a global digital economy.

Name: AudienceLab.io
Description:
AudienceLab.io - Pioneering the Digital Frontier

In today's digitized world, every click, like, and share tells a story. At AudienceLab.io, we harness the power of these stories, translating them into actionable insights that drive results. We're not just another advertising technology platform; we are the beacon guiding businesses through the dense fog of the digital landscape.

Our primary mission? To empower businesses, from agile startups to global giants, with first-party data that paints a comprehensive picture of their audience. With this invaluable data, businesses can sculpt personalized campaigns that resonate, capture, and convert. 

Why AudienceLab.io Stands Out:

 Precision Targeting: We believe in quality over quantity. Our cutting-edge technology enables businesses to zero in on their ideal customer, ensuring every marketing dollar is well spent.

 Identity Resolution: In the vast sea of anonymous website traffic, we’re the lighthouse. Our identity graphs and SuperPixel technology delve deep, transforming unknown visitors into known potential leads.

 Data Enrichment: We elevate raw data, refining it into gold—insights that inform, guide, and drive strategy.

 Future-Proof Strategies: The digital realm is ever-evolving. We ensure businesses remain not just relevant, but revolutionary, by staying ahead of the curve.

 Integrity and Transparency: In an age where data privacy is paramount, we're committed to ethical data practices, ensuring businesses can confidently harness the power of data without compromising on integrity.

But beyond the tools and tech, it's our people that truly set us apart. A team of visionaries, strategists, and digital ninjas, we're passionate about pushing the boundaries of what's possible in the digital space.

For businesses hungry for growth, for brands eager to carve a distinct identity in the cluttered marketplace, and for visionaries ready to shape the future, AudienceLab.io is your partner.

Name: The Periphery
Description:
The Periphery used to have a tech focus, and we described ourselves as society and culture podcast disguised in tech. 

But...here’s the thing. As we wrapped on season 2 and started brainstorming this season, we found ourselves feeling a bit boxed in. There are a lot of interesting peripheral conversations that are sometimes made less interesting, at least to us, when we’re restricted to discussing them through the lens of tech. So while the disruptive and powerful technologies that are transforming our society will always be an important element of this podcast, we are adopting a more sociological approach to understanding what technology means and its connections to culture and power. But do not fret. Our focus will always be geared toward bridging the two sides of the periphery: those empowered at the frontier and those on the margins that are left out.

Season 3 starting soon!

人の幸せに貢献し、自己実現する集団で在る。

人は幸せになるために生きている。私たちに関わる人々の幸せに貢献する。そのこと自体を私たち自身の自己実現の源泉としてゆく。
この理想を不朽の理念として私たちは掲げます。

またブランドミッションとして「Be a big fan」という言葉を掲げ、顧客も社員も双方が夢中になる事業の開発に集中することを使命とします。

「好きだから」という価値。「楽しいから」という価値。利益や利便性を超えた熱量や感情は美しい。
お客さまも社員も関係者の方々もそのご家族も。私たちはファンであふれる世界を創ります。


<何をやっているのか(WHAT)>

私たちオズビジョンは、創業以来「人の幸せに貢献し、自己実現する集団で在る」という理念を掲げ、顧客と社員の双方が夢中になる事業活動を追求してきました。

現在は購買支援の領域で複数のWebサービスを展開しています。

おかげさまで中核事業の「ハピタス」は創業以来17期連続成長を遂げており、2023年度時点では450万人のユーザーと3,000社のEC事業者をマッチングし、流通総額は国内最高水準の1,700億円を超える購買プラットフォームとなりました。

組織面においても、人間らしさを追求する弊社独自の取り組みが書籍「ティール組織」に取り上げられるなど、ビジネス書や雑誌に取り上げていただけるようになりました。事業だけでなく組織の面でも様々な挑戦に取り組んでいます。

今後も多くの方を幸せにし、また自分たちの可能性を追求するため、身の丈を超えるような挑戦を続けます。

<中核事業> 
■ハピタス 
https://hapitas.jp/

「ハピタス」はいつものECや旅行予約をはじめ、あらゆるサービス利用でポイントが貯まる日本最大級のポイントモールです。
ポイント還元率の高さと提携サイトの豊富さから、お買物や旅行をもっと楽しみたい「ECファン」に愛されるサービスとして年間流通総額1700億円を突破。

<リユース事業>
かんたん買取サービス「Pollet」
使っていない「モノ」余っている「外貨」や「商品券」、少額のまま使いづらい「ポイント」などを手軽にキャッシュ化できるサービスです。
最も簡単に不用品を売却できるUXを実現した「モノチャージ」がSNSや生活情報メディアで話題となり40万DLを突破。

<新規事業>
ADエージェンシー事業部「OZ ASP」
『ADエージェンシー事業部』は2021年にオズビジョンで立ち上がった新規事業部です。

業界は問わずに世の中で注目されている商材やサービスを提供している広告主が抱える「集客や認知度、売上」などといった拡販ニーズの課題を解決するために、メイン事業「ハピタス」のノウハウや、その他当社が持つアフィリエイトのノウハウをもとにweb広告をメインに提案する”新規広告主開拓営業”

『商品・サービス』と『アフィリエイトメディア(インフルエンサー、AD運用業者、SEOメディア、その他広告代理店 等)』とのマッチングを図り最適な広告出稿の提案をすることで、拡販効果を最大化するために開拓営業を行う”新規メディア開拓営業”

以上2つの領域に分かれ、良質な商材を世の中に送り出す仕掛け人の役割を担っています。

With content becoming a core marketing focus, Pathful is the tool to allow marketing to understand what is working and what isn't. Engagement Map

Pathful's Engagement Map has the most powerful in-page analysis on the market. It allows you to see which content on the page was interacted with and connecting it to subsequent conversion events. It's like a heat map on steroids.

Team Performance

Pathful's Team Page allows you to see your entire content team (including external resources) to see the impact that their content is having on your business. Maximize the performance of your team by assigning work where it makes sense. Enable coaching for those who need help in driving reach or conversions.

Producing content that works is hard, measuring its performance shouldn't be.

Name: d-Share / Escrow & Revenue Sharing
Description:
d-Share streamlines and secures business deals with escrowed payments released upon agreed conditions.

d-Share, developed by BE Blockchain, is tailor-made to tackle the prevalent challenges of trust, solvency, and payment delays in commercial transactions. As a pioneering escrow-as-a-service and revenue-sharing platform leveraging blockchain technology, d-Share is your next-gen solution for escrowed business transactions, capable of securing, fractioning, and automating multi-party agreements. It achieves this by safeguarding and automating financial transactions via various validation methods, including simple signatures from partners or verifiers, or through external data that activates the deal's smart contract, thereby triggering the transaction. This external data is sourced through the incorporation of Chainlink functions and oracles, encompassing a wide range of information such as video view counts that could initiate an influencer's payment.

Originally, BE Blockchain developed this tool to directly confront the issues of delayed payments and insolvency, as well as the empty promises of results from companies in marketing or promotional efforts—a widespread issue within the Web3 domain and beyond.

Name: TIDWIT

TIDWIT’s has served hundreds of organizations and is used by almost 400,000 organizational users in Fortune 500 companies on six continents. TIDWIT’s unique approach to partner enablement provides networks effects, making it easier to connect partners, increasing the footprint and flow of knowledge between partners. TIDWIT allows organizations to launch and share multiple ecosystem workloads such as learning, training, assessments, certification, marketing, campaigns, workspaces, forms, surveys, and polls to its ecosystem partners. Content and information shared on the TIDWIT network is delivered directly to the partner’s ecosystem node and integrated to the platform of their choice through TIDWIT's API. The TIDWIT platform also provides artificial intelligence (AI) that is contextualized, secure, relevant, and trustworthy. What is unique about the TIDWIT AI is its ability to be pushed into partner environments without the need for partners to build entire AI stacks. TIDWIT’s Ecosystem reporting provides unparalleled real-time insight into partner ecosystem engagement, ranging from the detailed partner user level to the broader organization and all the way to the entire ecosystem. Throughout, TIDWIT’s platform delivers security and privacy by leveraging organizations’ existing SSO, adhering to GDPR, and safeguarding PII information in accordance with each organization’s policies.

Name: GoFlexxi
Description:
About GoFlexxi
GoFlexxi is a demand-driven funding platform that empowers communities, creators, and organizations to launch shared experiences and ventures without financial risk.

We enable users to pool funds in escrow and only proceed with projects when there is proven demand. If the funding target is met, the project moves forward with confidence. If not, all backers are automatically refunded. This creates transparency, accountability, and a profitable mandate from day one.

GoFlexxi is used to power:

Private charter flights for fans, sports clubs, and tourism groups

Events, concerts, and supporter-driven matchups

Influencer-led meetups, retreats, and exclusive content drops

Community projects, merch campaigns, group travel, and more

What sets GoFlexxi apart is its ability to test and validate demand before any commitment is made — allowing users to eliminate guesswork, reduce risk, and move forward only when success is guaranteed.

If the crowd wants it, they fund it.
If they fund it, it happens.
If not, no one loses.

We’re building a repeatable system for entrepreneurs, creators, and communities to launch what people truly want — backed by real demand and secured capital.

Connect with us if you’re building in aviation, events, creator monetization, or demand-first commerce.

Name: LSTA Technologies
Description:

Parmi nos solutions phares, SSS (Smart Store system) se distingue comme un outil performant de gestion de stocks. Conçue pour répondre aux défis des entreprises disposant de volumes importants de produits, SSS permet d’optimiser les inventaires, de réduire les pertes et de suivre la disponibilité des articles en temps réel. Grâce à cette solution, le processus de pointage et d’inventaire devient rapide, précis et fiable, offrant aux entreprises la possibilité de gagner du temps et d’augmenter leur efficacité opérationnelle. SSS s’adapte à différents secteurs et tailles d’entreprise, qu’il s’agisse de la distribution, de l’électronique, du bricolage ou de tout autre domaine nécessitant une gestion rigoureuse des stocks.
Parallèlement, L.S.T.A Academy représente notre engagement envers l’éducation et le développement des compétences. Ce programme éducatif propose des formations pratiques en intelligence artificielle, digitalisation et technologies émergentes, adaptées aux besoins des professionnels et des étudiants. L.S.T.A Academy vise à préparer les talents aux métiers de demain, en les dotant de connaissances concrètes et d’expériences immersives qui leur permettent de s’adapter rapidement aux évolutions du marché. Nos formations favorisent l’apprentissage actif, la maîtrise des outils technologiques modernes et le développement d’une pensée innovante, essentielle pour relever les défis numériques actuels et futurs.Découvrez nos services sur lsta-technologies.com

Anybodies exists to remove the challenges of building in Web3 and open the floodgates for innovation and creation, and in doing so, become recognized as the world's leading NFT infrastructure provider.

In pursuit of that mission, we are taking a three-pronged approach:

1. Develop and launch proprietary technologies, like our Web3 CMS (the first in the world) that enhance the ability of entrepreneurs and brands to build on Web3 rails.
2. Grow our rewards platform into a household name—the home for loyalty rewards worldwide.
3. Produce phygital clothing items that forever change how consumers interact with their favorite brands, celebrities, and communities.

Since our launch in 2021, we’ve made significant progress towards our goals:

• We collaborated with Nike South Africa to release an exclusive collection of 65 custom phygital Air Force 1 sneakers. Today, holders of the AF1 NFT, which was originally used to redeem the physical pair, are earning rewards and maintain exclusive benefits within the Anybodies ecosystem for being early supporters.
• In collaboration with DeGods, one of the world’s most prolific NFT companies, we launched a limited run of 200 phygital hoodies—complete with an AR-powered unboxing experience that generated over 100,000 impressions on Instagram.
• We launched an NFC chip-linked sweater with Tay Keith, a globally famous producer, music programmer, and songwriter. The hoodie’s digital NFT counterpart, redeemable for the physical hoodie, did $150k in secondary sales on the first day of trading and $400k+ by the end of the first two weeks. For Tay Kieth, that yielded an extra $19 net per hoodie (1,000 total units).

For any entrepreneur, brand, celebrity, enterprise, creator, or community looking to make the most of what Web3 technology can offer at a fraction of the cost of building tools on their own, Anybodies is their premiere destination.

Name: Breitband-Kompetenzzentrum Schleswig-Holstein e. V. (BKZ.SH)
Description:
Das Breitband-Kompetenzzentrum Schleswig-Holstein (BKZ.SH) ist eine gemeinsame Einrichtung der kommunalen Landesverbände (Städteverband Schleswig-Holstein, Schleswig-Holsteinischer Gemeindetag, Schleswig-Holsteinischer Landkreistag) und wird durch das Land Schleswig-Holstein mit Mitteln aus dem Landesprogramm Wirtschaft sowie von der Europäischen Union gefördert.

Als zentrale Informations- und Koordinierungsstelle liegen die Hauptaufgaben des BKZ.SH in der umfassenden Beratung, Begleitung und Unterstützung der Akteure sowie aller Bürger:innen in Schleswig-Holstein, die den Ausbau eines flächendeckenden Glasfasernetzes vorantreiben und dazu beitragen, dass das nördlichste Bundesland bis 2025 mit schnellstem Breitband versorgt wird. Darüber hinaus engagiert sich das BKZ.SH mit dem Bildungsprojekt "Digitale Patin" im Bereich digitale Bildung und unterstützt damit das regionale Bildungsangebot zur Digitalkompetenzförderung älterer Menschen.

Ein flächendeckender Glasfaserausbau sowie die neuesten Mobilfunkstandards sind notwendig, um mit der voranschreitenden Digitalisierung Schritt zu halten und den technologischen Anforderungen an das Internet von morgen zu genügen. Zugleich wertet es den echten Norden als Wirtschaftsstandort sowie die Attraktivität des ländlichen Raumes massiv auf.

Name: PopChill 拍拍圈
Description:
我們是一個正在籌組,即將開始運作的「非典型」創業團隊。我們將在未來4~5個月的時間,從無到有,打造一個全新的「時尚網購社群平台」(Social+Commerce)。平台是走C2C marketplace模式,未來半年到一年內,公司的戰略方向是行動、時尚、社群、電商、四輪驅動,創造一個屬於年輕人的Fashion Community,初期切入市場的角度,將會是Resale Market中重中之重的"woman fashion",上線後一年的目標是提高目標市場覆蓋率。

也許你會想,在電商、社群市場飽和的今天,這個領域還能有什麼有趣的新題目? 事實上,這也正是我們和其他新創團隊最大的不同。我們團隊目前已經鎖定一個在其他國家已被驗證,但台灣還未見到的商業模式。此外,我們在公司成立前的籌備階段,即已預計募集到足以支撐至A輪募資的資金。

我們的APP叫做「拍拍圈」,拍取「拍賣」之意,圈有「社群」的意涵,目前正在召募公司成立的第一批團隊成員。我們相信,每一次創業,都要先從角落出發,避免一開始直接在舞台中央和大象對決。先把自己塞在一個角落,逐漸壯大後,再進入主流市場面對直接競爭。我們非常注重前10位團隊成員的特質,因為這會會形塑未來的企業文化。做為最早期的成員,可預期你在團隊裡會有很大的舞台和責任。

經營理念:
1.做新創公司該做的事:花最少的時間在「管理」,花最多的時間在「讓產品前進」
2.營造一個開放、自主、互助的新創團隊文化
3.創造一個有心理安全感的環境(也就是人們彼此信任,不怕說出心裡的話)
4.以顧客為中心,相信良好的消費者體驗是公司長期的競爭力
5.賦能、鼓勵和培育更多青年、Z世代創業者,幫助他們實現創業夢想
6.運用創新科技的網路公司,對世界、對社會、對我們未來的下一代產生正向的影響力
7.打破性別框架:,賦能更多新世代女性人才機會、在科技新創自我實現

因為您正在考慮加入我們,所以我們希望能多向你做一些自我介紹,拍拍圈科技有兩位創辦人分別是郭家齊(Andy)與廖家欣(Kelly)

郭家齊畢業於史丹佛資訊工程學(Computer Science)碩士,剛開始創業時,自己架網站自己寫程式,只花21天寫出一個社群網站,平常喜歡在FB寫廢文,以土法煉鋼模式製作LINE貼圖,並受到全台灣網友的歡迎(約10位),創業前在美國Yahoo、Oracle工作過,放棄領美金的年薪回台創業,曾經歷從0到1、1到100、100到N各個不同的創業階段,但他更享受一個創業項目、一個新創團隊、一個產品或服務從0到1的過程,因此有了成立「拍拍圈」的創業想法,有多次創業的經驗,現在的他,創業的企盼是在同行的路上,用企業的力量讓世界變得更美好。

廖家欣畢業於台大工管系,從27歲開始創業,到現在是擁有兩個小小孩的媽媽創業家,關注科技女力、女性賦權等議題,因此在拍拍圈公司章程第一條明訂依據聯合國永續發展發展目標(SDGs)第五項:「實現性別平等、並賦予婦女權利」。本公司不分性別、平等錄用,同工同酬。致力於在公司內部形塑一種共同的價值觀和文化-「友善職場」,就是無歧視、重平等的職場,對於內部夥伴彼此尊重、不分性別皆一視同仁,不分性別在職場發展中均有聘用和升遷的平權,致使團隊更專注在友善的工作環境與職涯發展上。

加入新創公司的挑戰絕對比你想像要多,也值得所有有志於在新創的人才,創業家年年有,但真正「能成功」的創業者並不多,拍拍圈的創辦團隊是有多次網路連續創業經驗,白手起家,並締造許多紀錄
–第一次創業:有被國際網路公司併購過、讓台灣新創被世界看見的經驗
–第二次創業:帶領創始團隊,以新創公司之姿,有在台灣成功IPO過的經驗
–第三次創業:做了一個電商市場後進者的題目,一開始並不順利,後來團隊決定很快轉向,也順利成功Pivot,成為一間70人大小的公司
–第四次創業:就是拍拍圈
–有創始團隊有被VC、知名天使投資人投資過,讓相信我們的投資人成功出場的經驗過

這是兩位創辦人的第四場創業戰役,目前公司正在積極招募職缺和我們一起從0開始動手打造新的網路服務,只有極少數的席次可以優先加入,創辦人及初期核心人物會親自面試,我們重視應徵者的學習能力、是否擁有成長心態(Growth Mindset),以及和公司文化的契合度。

Name: AdCrimson
Description:
Affiliate marketing is easy to dive into, but it takes a lifetime to master. Not everyone has the expertise, skills, resources, and contacts to revolutionize this industry. At a time of uncertainty and change within the digital landscape, we're uniquely poised to stand out as industry leaders. We help our partners make money but we also believe strongly in assisting them in earning and establishing an outstanding reputation while doing it.

We have a strong track record of meeting challenges head on and we foresee a glowing future for you and for all of our partners.

2. Technology. We rely on fraud detection to weed out any bad seeds. This enables us to focus our company’s interests on producing high-quality leads and conversions for all of our clients. When we display numbers, you can rest assured that they're real. Bots and undefined traffic are a thing of the past. With our clean, reliable data, we can pair you up to work with the right brands for you. That level of personalization, stemming from a mixture of technology and knowhow, is difficult to find anywhere else.

3. Customer service. We have your back. We are committed to ensuring on-time payments because we know that your payouts matter. We want you to keep your attention on building your business, and not on worrying whether you'll get paid what’s owed to you. As a courtesy, we offer a $5,000 performance bonus for all new affiliates. To deliver on this promise, we handpick and train affiliates to honor their end of the bargain, too; professionalism comes first, always.

4. Opportunity. We have developed and harnessed relationships with clients we know to have strong and trustworthy reputations. Let us do the vetting on your behalf, as we know our company's reputation is only as strong as the people we work with. You don’t have to waste your time finding the right fit. We’ll hand them to you.

Ultimately, it's all about performance. AdCrimson goes to greater lengths than anyone else to bring the affiliate industry into a new era full of hope, authenticity, and prosperity. Start by choosing us as your partners, and we'll show you the way forward.

Our offices are located in Las Vegas, Manila, Hong Kong, and Bangkok.

Name: 2@Key
Description:
Basker.bio isn’t Linktree, Linkfree, or Beacons. Those platforms keep your page, your data, and your audience stuck inside their walls. You send traffic, they get the benefit. We think your audience belongs to you, not to a platform. Simple.

Basker.bio runs on the AT Protocol, so your profile is open and portable. Any platform can support it for free using our app.linkbio records, and you can even throw your links on a personal site if you want. No lock-ins, no “sorry, upgrade to export.”

Other platforms make you pay for themes, widgets, and even hiding their logo. Basker.bio gives you everything by default. Ads? Your choice. Turn them off, or turn them on and earn from them. Your page, your rules.

That’s the difference. Basker.bio isn’t just a page full of buttons, it’s your identity, your data, and your link in bio, without paywalls or platform traps. Fun idea: you actually own it.

Description:

Pet parents can earn real cashback while shopping their favorite pet brands online, without changing how or where they buy.

Think Rakuten, purpose-built for pet parents, with cashback activated at the moment of purchase.

No points.

Name: Littledata
Description:
Littledata is the data layer for Shopify.

We provide a Shopify-native, server-side foundation that delivers accurate, consistent signals to Google Analytics, paid media platforms, and email tools.

Tracking built for the web doesn’t work reliably on Shopify. Shopify’s architecture is different, its checkout is proprietary, and its release cycle is constant. As a result, data breaks quietly and confidence erodes.

Teams see Shopify and Google Analytics drift out of sync. Paid media under-reports due to weak or incomplete signals. Email and SMS flows misfire because identity data is missing or unstable. Shopify updates break tracking setups, and Google Tag Manager patches don’t survive.

Littledata fixes this at the infrastructure level.

We capture the exact events Shopify emits, align with Shopify’s identity model, and stream clean, server-side Shopify signals to the tools that power growth — including Google Analytics, Meta and Google Ads, and email and SMS platforms like Klaviyo.

There’s no engineering work, no manual patching, and no ongoing maintenance.

Littledata doesn’t replace your tools. It powers them with accurate Shopify data.

If your business runs on Shopify, your signal foundation should too.

Trust is not a feature on Yushaa. Trust is the product. Our escrow system, vendor verification tiers, and dispute resolution infrastructure exist so that every transaction, no matter how small, is protected.

Yushaa operates across four growth phases: from building the foundation of verified vendor commerce, to becoming the operating system of West African trade, to owning the payment rails and data intelligence layer that powers the entire ecosystem.

We are building the infrastructure that makes doing business in West Africa easier. For every vendor. For every buyer. Every single day.

We work with: Governments | Financial Institutions | Development Partners | Enterprise & FMCG Companies | Diaspora Communities

Name: 10-Bravo (Pty) Ltd
Description:
Most businesses don't fail because of a lack of ambition. They stall because their technology can't keep pace with where they're trying to go.

At 10-Bravo, we built our entire operating model around that reality. We call it the Ascent Model, a five-camp framework that maps your IT journey the way a serious expedition maps a summit, deliberately, in sequence, from exactly where you stand today. Base Camp to Summit. Every camp a complete, capable engagement. Every step intentional.

We don't prescribe a destination before we understand your terrain. Before anything is deployed, your Virtual CIO maps the route, aligning technology to your business outcomes, governing the climb, and making sure every decision serves your ascent. The mountain looks different from every starting point. The direction is always the same: up.

What makes 10-Bravo different isn't what we carry, it's who we climb with. We operate at the centre of a deliberately curated partner ecosystem, built on a simple principle: we don't try to be everything. The strongest ascents are never solo efforts. We bring best-of-breed specialists to the table at exactly the right moment, and we integrate around the relationships you've already built, not over them.

We are Johannesburg-based, Africa-focused, and built by practitioners who have operated at the sharp end of enterprise IT. We are young, deliberate, and building something worth building.

If you're ready to ascend , we know the route.

Name: Norruva
Description:
Building Norruva — a multi-tenant Digital Product Passport (DPP) infrastructure platform for ESPR and delegated-act compliance.

We’re making DPP workflows practical across complex supply chains by providing the “infrastructure layer” behind implementation: structured product data, partner-ready integrations, traceability/evidence capture, and compliance-oriented outputs that support audits and downstream reporting (EU first, global next).

What we’re building:
• ESPR-aligned DPP data model + lifecycle compliance workflows
• Multi-tenant SaaS for manufacturers, importers, and implementation partners
• Traceability + evidence capture to support audits and reporting
• Partner ecosystem + GTM: pilots, integrations, and solution/implementation partnerships
• Hiring and onboarding early team members as we prepare for MVP launch

Exploring integrity anchoring where it adds value (e.g., tamper-evident proofs), while staying compliance-first.

Open to: pilot conversations with manufacturers/importers + partnerships with implementation firms supporting DPP readiness.

Name: TAMEEM LTD
Description:
I've always been a bit of a loner. I've never been the type of person who enjoys being around a lot of people, and I've always been more comfortable working on my own. So when I decided to start my own business, it was a natural fit for me to go the solopreneur route.

I started out with a passion for SEO, and I quickly honed my skills and expertise in the world of digital marketing. As my knowledge grew, I ventured into the realm of affiliate marketing, where I successfully generated a steady income of $2K/month.

But my vision didn't stop there. I was fueled by ambition and a desire for greater success, so I set an audacious goal of achieving $100k/ARR (annual recurring revenue). I knew that it would be a challenge, but I was determined to make it happen.

I started by creating a lean, nimble business model that would allow me to scale quickly and efficiently. I also focused on creating remarkable offerings that captivated my audience and catered to their needs. My dedication to quality and customer satisfaction was paramount, and I knew that this would be the key to my success.

With each step, I was learning, adapting, and embracing challenges as opportunities. My relentless pursuit of excellence and unwavering determination made me a force to be reckoned with in the digital business landscape.

Today, I'm proud to say that I've achieved my goal of $100k/ARR, and I'm still just getting started. I'm excited to continue inspiring, innovating, and surpassing expectations on my solopreneurial journey.

I know that my story is not unique, but I hope that it will inspire other entrepreneurs who are just starting out. If you have a dream, don't let anyone tell you that you can't achieve it. Just go for it, and never give up.

I'm Anwar Tameem, and I'm a solopreneur on a mission to conquer new heights in the digital landscape.

Name: LVCI SAS - Laissez Vous Convaincre Inc
Description:
Nous pensons que l’individu a toute sa place dans le monde digital, c'est pourquoi notre startup ambitionne de remettre la voix, force de la relation humaine, au cœur des échanges web.
	
Depuis 2013, Laissez Vous Convaincre (http://www.lvci.fr/) œuvre pour développer une technologie propriétaire unique pour créer des outils de communication et sites d’intermédiation sociale, à destination de tous les acteurs du web.

Point fédérateur de ses créations (Speed Phoning, Click Phoner, ...), Laissez Vous Convaincre se projette à la place des internautes, pour une conversation 3.0 : expérience novatrice, sociale et protégée.

Forte d’une vision disruptive et de valeurs tournées vers le service client, Laissez Vous Convaincre se positionne aux antipodes de son marché et pousse à revoir non seulement les relations humaines sur le web, mais aussi toute la relation client.

Notre volonté est à terme d’inverser la relation client, permettant aux « consommateurs » de bénéficier d’une technologie qui leur redonne le pouvoir et la maîtrise face aux services commerciaux. Dans ce but, nous intégrons, dans notre solution phare, un espace spécialement créé pour la valorisation du client : gestion des appels, de la disponibilité, suivi et enregistrement, ... Tout y est développé pour que sa satisfaction soit totale et qu’il ne soit en contact avec un service commercial que s’il l’a décidé.

Il bénéficie donc de conversations spontanées, désirées, sait ce qui s’échange dans sa relation avec le SAV et évite la téléprospection.

Cela peut sembler tourné B2C, mais au final, il faut remettre cet avantage dans notre contexte, pour y voir une valeur ajoutée importante pour nos clients B2B, dans leur stratégie.

Name: AI AVIATOR
Description:
AI didn’t break sales.
It exposed that execution was never designed.

For years, organisations invested in better tools, better training, and better dashboards - while leaving execution fragmented across sales, marketing, enablement, operations, and partners.

That worked before AI.

AI increases speed.
Without execution design, it also increases drift, silent failure, and loss of judgment, especially at the handoffs.

AI Aviator is a Sales Activation World.

It is a role-based sales methodology and operating system, delivered as a World so teams can actually execute it.

AI Aviator designs execution across the revenue system, protects human judgment, and allows AI to accelerate work only where judgment boundaries are clear.

This is not about making reps faster.

It is about making sales decisions safe at speed.

AI Aviator is not:

•	A sales training programme
•	An AI copilot or assistant
•	A productivity overlay
•	A reporting or analytics layer

Those optimise activity.
They do not govern execution.

AI Aviator operates above existing sales frameworks (MEDDPICC, Challenger, SPIN), ensuring good selling actually happens - consistently - across teams and partner ecosystems.

The system is built around five core elements:

•	Flightpaths: Clear role-based authority from Navigator to Commander
•	Missions: Structured execution moments tied to real deals and campaigns
•	Judgment Boundaries: Explicit rules for where AI may assist and where it must stop
•	RevOps-Led Execution Design: Standards, signals, and early intervention
•	Partner Ecosystem Development: Scaling execution through capability, not coordination


Execution holds only when ownership is explicit.

AI Aviator exists so RevOps can design outcomes, not chase them after the quarter closes.

AI Aviator is built for RevOps, sales, and revenue leaders accountable for outcomes without direct control of every decision.

Program indirmenize de gerek yok:
Afillikitap’ın en önemli kolaylığı, uygulamaya girdiğinizde sadece bilgisayarınızdaki değil Facebook, Instagram, Picassa gibi farklı sosyal medyalardaki fotoğraflarınızı da rahatlıkla aynı albüm içinde bir araya getirebiliyorsunuz.  Ayrıca tüm bunları program indirmeden tamamen on-line olarak internet üzerinden yapabiliyorsunuz. Üstelik fotokitabınızı Facebook ya da e-posta ile paylaşabiliyor, hatta kendi blogunuza link verebiliyorsunuz.

Sadece 3 adımda hazır :
Afillikitap ile herşey 3 adımda hazırlanıyor. 1. adımda fotokitabının konusuna göre bir kitap ve tema seçtikten sonra 2.adımda fotoğraflarınızı yükleyip yerleştiriyorsunuz 3.adımda siparişiniz hazır. 7 gün kitabınız elinizde.  Hepsi sert kapaklı ve ciltli olan kitabınız, kare, yatay ya da dikey, sayfaları ise kuşe ya da tam sayfa açılan layflat olabiliyor.

Name: Monheimius & Partner Marketing and more
Description:
Nach über 10 Jahre im Network Marketing habe ich mich Anfang 2009 von der herkömmlichen Arbeitsweise mit Produktverkauf und Kaltkontakten verabschiedet und mich für das Thema Online Marketing entschieden.

Die Arbeitsweise der meisten Network Marketer geht mir allerdings zunehmend auf die Nerven. Was nicht funktioniert und hochgradig unprofessionell ist weiß ich inzwischen. Ich habe eine Menge Menschen kennengelernt, die alle Hoffnungen in ihr Network-Business setzten und kläglich scheiterten, aufgrund eines nichtvorhandenen Systems zur Finanzierung ihres Geschäfts. 

Ich habe mir auf die Fahne geschrieben, diesen Menschen zu helfen. Meine „Forschungsreise“ brachte mich in die USA, wo ich an ein System geriet, das meine Denkweise Network Marketing betreffend total umstürzte.

Dieses System nehme ich nun als Beispiel für eigenen Produkte. Das MLMLeadSystem nimmt mir hierbei schon mal einen großen Teil der Arbeit ab. Ich konzentriere mich dabei in erster Linie auf Social Media Marketing.

Neben Social Media Marketing ist Persönlichkeitswachstum meine ganz große Leidenschaft. Denn zuerst einmal geht es darum, der Mensch zu werden, der Sie sein müssen, um überhaupt erfolgreich zu werden.

Wohin die Reise geht, kann man auf meinem Blog erkennen, in meinem Emailkurs und den wöchentlichen Newslettern. Wer mehr wissen möchte, darf mich gerne kontaktieren.

Description:

"SOLE is my sixteenth dog!! But SOLE is different from my other dogs. 
And SOLE is the reason why I thought about PetAdviser.
Since she has arrived, SOLE has learned to behave appropriately in every situation, even better than many people, so I decided to attend only those places where pets are welcome. Restaurants, bars, shopping malls, shops, at home dinners, hotels, I just go if SOLE can come with me and I saw how things are gradually changing: there are many families who have a dog and not just guard dogs. They are family members and the people I met had my same needs. They just wanted easy access to services.
 I realised that this social change was not supported by an appropriate service offer.
I have also studied the data of a huge market that moves large amounts of money by leveraging emotions of those who love their pets and I have noticed that both supply and demand in this field are quite confused and users struggle to decipher messages that are often conflicting.
So, the idea behind PetAdviser was already there, ready to fill a gap in a vast market like that of pets.  The need for a place to gather and share experiences, to help others and where to get advice. A place that will help those who want to leave for a weekend at the beach with their pets and do not know what are the best but also the worst beaches, restaurants, vets, hotels in the area, as well as shops, breeders and all those professionals who work to give us and our little friends the best.

Through our platform, a buyer deposits funds into a secure holding account. The seller delivers the product or service, and payment is released only after the buyer confirms successful delivery. This simple flow protects both sides from fraud, disputes, and uncertainty.

Nowayo is built for:
• Online sellers and small businesses
• Freelancers and digital service providers
• Marketplaces and social commerce
• Anyone who wants a safer way to buy or sell online

Our focus is on reliability, clarity, and ease of use. By combining secure payments, status tracking, and a fair dispute resolution system, Nowayo creates a consistent and dependable transaction experience for everyone.

Nowayo is redefining trust in online commerce — with a modern payment process people can rely on.

Name: Yapit Places
Description:
Yapit Places is a location-based growth and rewards platform built to drive real customers into local businesses. We don’t sell ads or clicks. We deliver foot traffic, engagement, and measurable revenue.

Local marketing has focused on attention instead of action for too long. Businesses pay for impressions while customers never walk through the door. Yapit Places changes that by connecting digital discovery directly to real-world visits using smart location technology, real-time promotions, and behavior-based rewards.

Merchants use Yapit Places to get discovered locally, launch targeted campaigns, attract new customers, and turn first-time visitors into loyal regulars. Everything is designed around results — not vanity metrics.

Yapit Places operates inside a full business ecosystem that includes location-based marketing, payments and POS, eCommerce tools, digital marketing (SMS, email, geo-fencing, social and influencer campaigns), rewards and loyalty programs, and business management tools like CRM and analytics. This unified platform allows businesses to grow, engage customers, and manage operations all in one place.

We serve restaurants, retail stores, coffee shops, gyms, salons, spas, event venues, service businesses, and multi-location brands. If your business relies on local customers, Yapit Places is built for you.

Our mission is to empower local businesses with smarter growth technology, strengthen communities, and replace wasted advertising with real engagement.

Our vision is a future where discovery drives real-world commerce, rewards influence positive behavior, and local businesses thrive using modern technology.

Yapit Places is creating the new standard for local growth.

Description:
Weega è un social commerce che rivoluziona l'esperienza dell'acquisto di giochi da tavolo. A differenza dei tradizionali e-commerce, non dispone di un catalogo ma ogni prodotto presente sulla piattaforma è il frutto di una proposta della nostra community, composta da oltre 5000 appassionati.

Fondata nel 2019 da un gruppo di amici uniti dallo stesso interesse, Weega è nata con l’obiettivo di creare un luogo nel quale gli utenti potessero connettersi con altri giocatori e cercare il prodotto desiderato, in anteprima, non sempre facilmente reperibile o dagli alti costi d’importazione.

Su Weega è possibile condividere, scoprire e partecipare all’acquisto collettivo dei giochi più introvabili o di nuova produzione. Grazie ai nostri Gruppi d'Acquisto, nessun titolo è troppo raro e nessun prezzo è troppo alto, in virtù della forza della community!

Entra nel nostro mondo, dove la passione per i giochi da tavolo trova la sua espressione più autentica e condivisa. Con Weega ogni acquisto diventa un momento di connessione e divertimento.

Come funziona?
Partecipa: cerca tra i GA aperti il prodotto che vuoi acquistare, vai nella pagina di dettaglio e 'Partecipa' al Gruppo d’Acquisto. Segui le istruzioni per riservarti la tua copia ma ricorda che i GA hanno una scadenza e un numero minimo di adesioni perché si chiudano con successo. Nel caso in cui non dovesse avvenire, sarà rimborsata l’intera cifra.
Vota: cerca nella sezione Community le proposte fatte dagli altri utenti e, se trovi quello che desideri, mostra il tuo interesse con il . Più persone lo faranno, più rapidamente cercheremo la disponibilità e apriremo il GA.
Proponi: se il prodotto che cerchi non è in vendita e non è stato ancora proposto, vai nella sezione Community e Fa’ la tua proposta! Come per tutte le altre, nel momento in cui gli altri Weegers mostreranno interesse nei suoi confronti, noi faremo di tutto perché possa diventare un un GA.

In Jan of 2022, we wanted to give a voice to the incredible people who work at AWS, in an unscripted  and unedited manner to provide authentic insights into their journey. We "virtualized the Hallway Chat" in short 5-10min videos where guests shared their current role, insight into their function, their learnings, future goals and who they are outside of work. Expanding on the impact and learnings, we were approved to have a live show so we can still have that authentic conversation but allow a live audience to engage with appropriate questions that our guests can answer live. Dynamic Content Library

Name: Grabbr
Description:
Grabbr is built around the belief that the most powerful way to motivate buying behavior is through the recommendation of a friend.

Grabbr is a SOCIAL REFERRAL MARKETING PLATFORM that facilitates the recommendation of a friend digitally all while solving 2 problems:

PROBLEM 1
Consumers spend countless hours building and cultivating their social fan bases, email lists, and contact lists on their phones, but there is no way for them to leverage those fan bases for any type of monetary gain. 

PROBLEM 2
Businesses beg consumers to “Like and Share” their products and services but consumers aren’t incentivized to do that.

SOLUTION
Grabbr has solved these problems for both groups by allowing businesses to create a customized message, then upload and “lock” a digital reward (i.e., coupon) to that message, allowing customers to leverage the value of their social fan bases to “Share” the message in exchange for unlocking the digital reward. That process continues multiple generations deep as consumers continue sharing with their friends in exchange for unlocking rewards. 
Fans gain access to rewards, and businesses gain social ambassadors! 

Grabbr has created the world’s first global currency based on the underlying value of social influence.

Name: Chipress Academy
Description:
We founded Chipress Academy (https://chipress.online) and wrote the book series “Crack the Hardware Interview” to help undergraduate / graduate students and working professionals prepare for the digital design / verification interviews.

We have been through multiple rounds of hardware interviews, and understand how stressful and struggling the process can be. We also suffered the same pain as you might have when desiring to grow further or explore new opportunities in this field. Unlike software engineers who are able to find countless online sources such as LeetCode, Stack Overflow, etc., hardware engineers can hardly find their counterparts. The golden information is here and there, but nowhere summarizes it in an organized way that can be easily followed.

This website and the book series are designated to share our knowledge, experience and view towards digital design / verification interviews. In particular, the structure of the book series is organized in the same way as how the modern ASIC / VLSI industry partitions the workflow.

We hope you find the information in this website and the book series useful, bring them to help others, and share across the community.

Description:
Battery Operated Systems for Community Outreach Uganda (BOSCO-U) is a faith-based, non-profit organization based in Gulu, Uganda.

We began in 2007 as an intervention to end the isolation of people in Internally Displaced People’s (IDP) camps through wireless computing which was powered by solar energy. Over the years, we've evolved to meet the changing needs of the communities we serve, but our core mission has remained the same: empowering individuals and communities through the provision of ICT training, internet connectivity, and digital resources.

Today, BOSCO Uganda continues to be a beacon of digital inclusion, working tirelessly to ensure that the rural communities of Northern Uganda are not left behind in the digital age. Our journey is a testament to the power of technology, community, and the human spirit.

Name: Bucket – Opportunity Awaits
Description:
Welcome to Bucket, the intuitive, user-friendly mass marketing platform that lets you reach new audiences across the entire digital world.

Today, more and more companies are understanding that even the largest, most impressive marketing department just can’t compare to the power of the crowd. 

That’s why Bucket enables businesses to harness the collective skills and access of thousands of independent marketers – it’s the best way to get maximum results without investing your own resources.

How Does It Work?
Our model is based on the affiliate marketing concept, which enables people to earn commissions by marketing another company’s products. We’ve adapted this to the needs of the Israeli market and the modern era.

Every marketer who signs up to Bucket receives a unique link for each product. Once the defined conversion is achieved, the marketer earns a reward. Simple!

No Risk, No Surprises!
Bucket is a results-based platform with a Cost Per Action (CPA) payment model. This means you only pay for actual results you define in advance – like making a purchase, downloading a product, leaving details in a form, and so on. You also decide what rewards will be paid, which marketing channels can be used, and any regulatory restrictions. There’s simply no downside.

The Power of the Crowd
Traditional marketing can only take you so far. Bucket can work with your in-house teams or digital marketing agencies to bring your campaigns to the next level. 

Your path to online success begins here.

Zur Beurteilung von Online Kampagnen finden unterschiedliche Messkriterien Anwendung. Nicht selten auch Indikatoren, die über die Performance einer Kampagne nur beschränkte Aussagen erlauben.

Beim Performance Marketing werden Online Kampagnen und Webauftritte primär über die Conversion beurteilt und optimiert.

Zu den Merkmalen von Performance Marketing gehören die Messbarkeit, der modulare Aufbau und die Optimierbarkeit. Insbesondere die bereits zu Kampagnenstart zeitnahe Mess- & Optimierbarkeit, bringen gegenüber den klassischen Marketingaktivitäten wesentliche Vorteile mit sich.

Zum Performance Marketing gehören grundsätzlich alle messbaren Online Aktivitäten. In letzter Zeit haben sich folgende Instrumente des Performance Marketings besonders etabliert:

- Suchmaschinenoptimierung
- Schaltung von Textanzeigen wie Google Adwords
- Klassische Online Kampagnen: Banners, Games,
- Social Media Kampagnen über facebook oder twitter
- Newsletters / E-Mail Marketing
- Affiliate Marketing

Als die wohl wichtigste Disziplin beim Performance Marketings gewinnt Web Analytics zunehmend an Bedeutung. Erfahrung in der Beurteilung von Webdaten und beim Ableiten von Massnahmen, stellen eine professionelle Web Analyse sicher. Die Performance einer Website, eines Webshop‘s oder von Online Kampagnen, kann so gesteigert werden.

Name: Trend Pickz | Trending Products, Smart Finds & Online Deals
Description:
Trend Pickz is a digital-first product discovery and affiliate marketing brand dedicated to helping people find trending, useful, and high-value products from trusted online marketplaces. Our mission is to simplify online shopping by highlighting products that are innovative, practical, and in demand—so users can make smarter buying decisions with confidence.

Every day, thousands of products launch and trend across platforms like Amazon and other global eCommerce marketplaces. Trend Pickz filters through this fast-moving ecosystem to identify items that truly stand out. We focus on a wide range of categories including technology gadgets, phone and car accessories, home and kitchen tools, lifestyle products, kids toys, seasonal items, and gift ideas. Our goal is to present these products in a clear, engaging, and easy-to-understand way.

Our content strategy combines research, trend analysis, and creative storytelling. We use short-form videos, visual demonstrations, written insights, and data-driven discovery to explain how products work, why they are trending, and who they are best suited for. AI-assisted tools may support research and content structuring, but all final content is reviewed and curated to maintain quality, originality, and relevance.

Trend Pickz operates within the affiliate marketing ecosystem, meaning some of the links we share may earn us a commission at no additional cost to users. Transparency and trust are core values of our brand. We aim to recommend products that align with audience interests and provide genuine value, rather than promoting items blindly.

Our brand maintains an active presence across multiple platforms including LinkedIn, X (Twitter), Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Telegram, and our official website. Each platform serves a specific purpose—from professional insights and trend analysis to deal alerts, product demos, and community engagement.

A Digital Marketing Agency is a company that specializes in online marketing strategies to help businesses grow their online presence and reach their target audience more effectively. Here's a breakdown of what they typically do:

1. Search Engine Optimization (SEO): 

They optimize websites to rank higher on search engine results pages, which helps increase organic (non-paid) traffic.

2. Content Marketing: 

They create and promote valuable content to generate brand awareness, traffic growth, lead generation, and customers.

3. Social Media Marketing: 

They promote your brand and your content on social media channels to increase brand awareness, drive traffic, and generate leads for your business.

4. Pay-Per-Click (PPC): 

They drive traffic to your website by paying a publisher every time your ad is clicked. One of the most common types of PPC is Google Ads.

5. Affiliate Marketing: 

They promote someone else's products or services on their website.

6. Email Marketing: 

They communicate with their audience and customers through email to promote content, discounts, events, and to direct people toward the business's website.

7. Online PR: 

They manage a company's online reputation and handle damage control in case of negative reviews or feedback.

8. Inbound Marketing:

They create valuable content tailored to your audience, and use this content to form a lasting relationship with your audience.

9. Marketing Automation: 

They use software to automate repetitive tasks such as emails, social media, and other ...

Name: Akilava.ai
Description:
Let’s cut to the chase: 90% of SaaS companies fail. That’s not a typo—it’s the statistical equivalent of trying to build a unicorn on a trampoline in a windstorm.
Why? Because 53% of SaaS licenses go unused, quietly feeding churn. Churn above 5% is lethal—you can keep pouring in new customers, but if they’re slipping out the back, growth stalls. And then there’s the Rule of 40: your growth rate plus profit margin should exceed 40%. Miss it, and you’re not scaling—you’re sinking.
So how do the winners beat the odds? They don’t scale alone. They build a partner ecosystem—not a loose Rolodex of resellers, but a living, revenue-driving machine that compounds growth.
The playbook is straightforward:
1. Be partner-attractive with clear value, technical compatibility, and a GTM motion partners can actually execute.
2. Recruit and enable the right SIs, VARs, and MSPs to sell, implement, and deliver outcomes—not just resell licenses.
3. Build a clear, simple partner program with tiers, tools, certifications, and predictable incentives.
4. Reward partners across the entire customer lifecycle—from deal registration and PoCs to adoption, consumption, and renewals.
The impact is measurable: companies with mature partner incentive programs grow 32% faster (Accenture).
The truth:
A great product gets you to $3M ARR.
A great partner ecosystem gets you to $100M+.
If this feels like your lived reality, Akilava is building for exactly this moment—combining a hands-on consulting service with a next-generation partner platform that uses AI to incentivize partners across the full customer lifecycle. Akilava is funded and currently in stealth.
Build the ecosystem, and the ARR will follow.

Name: Marketmaker Service
Description:
I'm just an abnormal boy, an average Nigerian like you with no privileges, no rich uncles or aunties all I had was my DESIRE TO SUCCEED, the FEAR OF POVERTY, and the fear of constantly living in LACK and WANT.


This strive for a better life led me to start searching for ways to better my life and that of my family LEGALLY.

During my service year, I worked with a company where I literally have to go from Lekki to Ikeja stand under the sun from morning till night looking for bikes  because my salary depends on that. Big Wahal if you see me then ehn I was as black as the word black can sound because of constant sun exposure and lost weight. But against all odds, I did that just so I could save money because I know the situation of our country. 

I was able to save up some money so I could use it to start up something when I finish service but guess what? I lost the money. all that money in the so-called "Crypto platform" Aka invest 50k to get 150k in the next 48hrs. Oh I become frustrated and depressed but that didn't stop me.

Then one day my Nysc friend told me about a particular business model called AFFILIATE MARKETING and that was the beginning of my success journey.

Started this online business In December, then implementation of the business January in fact that was my new year resolution.

January is so special to me because that marked the beginning of my success as an affiliate. 

Although the journey wasn't easy at first which is normal especially if you are starting something newly. But I knew that if other people can make 6-7 figures weekly from this online business then I too can. 


And then in 3 months, I made my first 20k online wow! It feels so good but I knew I needed more so I pushed myself harder a few months later I now earn consistent 6 figures weekly and not just that, I have also traveled to different countries of the world and still counting. 

What changed?


ACCESS TO QUALITY INFORMATION and THE POWER OF LEVERAGE via the INTERNET.

Chúng tôi đang ở những bước chạy đà quan trọng nhất và đang tích cực tìm kiếm những cộng sự nòng cốt – đặc biệt là các vị trí Giám đốc Công nghệ (CTO) và Chuyên viên Thiết kế UI/UX (UI/UX Designer),...

Name: KK Mediat
Description:
The origins of KK Mediat roots to mid 1990s. Back then I created my first websites (about how to build websites). Few years later, when I was doing my bachelors studies on eCommerce I started thinking about rebuilding those sites and creating myself a modern portfolio. As I had stumbled upon a brand new marketing technique called SEO, I wanted to give it a try as well.  So I bought my first .com  and started working.  It did not take long for it to become one of the biggest and most popular webdev and internet marketing related websites in Finland of the late 1990s and early 2000s. 

In late 2001 life granted me an opportunity to think of my future career.  I took a very bold step and decided to start my own business. KK Mediat was born in January 7th 2002. 

Initially the business was all about SEO and ecommerce and digital publishing, but as years went by also affiliate marketing,  PPC-marketing and web-analytics came along very strongly into mix.  As my  knowledge on the prior topics grew stronger, so did the demand of  training classes and similar services.  So I responded to that cry, and ultimately became one of the biggest indentent  ITC-training services providers in Finland with knowledge nobody else had.  Needless to say those were some busy and very good years.   

Like in all stories, there is also the end. 2019 was a year of great personal lossess for me. Just like in the beginning of my story, life granted me an opportunity to think of what I want to become. And I chose differently. 

KK Mediat still continues to exist and serves existing customers (and occasional new clients).  It is a dragon that sleeps. Maybe it awakens back to it's full glory someday, maybe it continues to sleep. Time will tell.

Procurely IT exists to structure and control that process.

We do not push preferred vendors.

We run the buying process properly.

Name: Passion Mastery
Description:
Have you ever felt helpless being stuck in a "dead end job" for too long?
 Are you concerned that you may be a victim from company restructuring?

Hi, my name is Eugene.

I was working for 14 years as an Area Sales Manager for a Swedish MNC responsible for the Asia Pacific region.  

Though I had a good high paying job but what I did not like was that I was traveling 50-60% of my time and had missed out spending time with my kids who were growing up.

Then in 2012, something unimaginable happened. My company had a restructuring. I was offered the ultimatum of accepting the company restructuring process or leave the company.

As I was already looking for a way out of my frequent traveling, I chose to leave the company and ventured into entrepreneurship.

 I did Forex
 I did stocks
 I did Affiliate Marketing
 I did Network Marketing
 I did Drop Shipping
 And all did not work out for me!

In 2017, I realise that I needed skills to build an online business without high overheads and huge operating cost. I am grateful that I have acquired the skills necessary to create a full time income online. 

Now, I want to show how professionals like me who are either feeling lost in life after working for many years or those who are afraid of being retrenched how they too can start a successful online business like I did.

Is that you?

Drop me a message and let's chat.

WHAT OTHERS SAY : 

"Eugene really empowered us to go for it!" - Rosima

"Thanks Eugene for the great training, I know my path clearer!" - Ms. Ong

"The training today is fun, wonderful and insightful. I learned a lot about social media marketing and am filled with positive spirit, skills and knowledge to apply for the business." - Stella

"Eugene is very helpful and down to earth!" - Stephanie

MobiPresent brings an online and mobile friend-2-friend marketing platform, offering businesses an innovative tool to boost sales and profits.

MobiPresent is all about gifts, a very positive way to drive customers to both offline and online stores, while creating awareness in social media. In just a few clicks people can delight their friends with digital gift cards from their favourite brand, retailer or service provider. The gift cards can be redeemed for real products or services at designated stores.

After the successful launch of a demo application under the ClickSendGift brand name in Thailand, MobiPresent is now ready for roll-out in European markets.

Name: Waaibot
Description:
Waaibot — Unified Conversational Automation for Social & Commerce

Customer communication has changed forever. Conversations no longer happen in one place. They happen across WhatsApp, Instagram, Messenger, websites, and eCommerce platforms—often at the same time. Yet most businesses still rely on fragmented tools that treat each channel separately, forcing teams to duplicate logic, manage multiple dashboards, and simplify their workflows to fit platform limitations.

Waaibot was built to solve this fragmentation.

Waaibot is a unified conversational automation platform that connects social channels and eCommerce systems in parallel, not in silos. Instead of building separate bots for WhatsApp, Instagram, or online stores, businesses design logic once and deploy it everywhere.

At the core of Waaibot is a visual, tree-based workflow engine. Conversations are modeled the way humans actually communicate—branching, contextual, and intent-driven. Each workflow starts with a trigger from any channel (message, button click, webhook, or system event), branches based on user input or business rules, and ends with real actions such as sending messages, calling APIs, updating CRM or order systems, or assigning human agents.

Unlike linear chatbot tools, Waaibot maintains conversation state and business context across channels. A user can start on Instagram, continue on WhatsApp, and complete an order from an eCommerce trigger—without breaking the flow.

This is where Waaibot differs from platforms like ManyChat. ManyChat focuses on channel-specific marketing automation. Waaibot focuses on business logic orchestration. Our workflows are not limited to campaigns or broadcasts; they power operations, support, sales, and commerce from a single source of truth.

Whether you are automating customer support, qualifying leads, recovering abandoned carts, or managing conversations across multiple social and commerce channels, Waaibot enables you to build logic—not limitations.

Name: Above the API
Description:
Above the API is the go-to-market layer above the product.

DevTools companies with strong developer adoption have a specific GTM problem: the product earns developer trust, but the website can't close an enterprise deal. Procurement teams land on a developer-first site, can't find a business case, and leave. The deal dies before a conversation starts.

Above the API documents that gap — and shows exactly how to close it.

Every week: one real DevTools company, one ERG score, every gap in the enterprise GTM surface exposed and mapped to specific fixes.

The ERG Framework
Enterprise Readiness for GTM. An 8-dimension scoring model for evaluating how well a DevTools company's go-to-market surface supports enterprise buying — pricing clarity, security posture, proof structure, compliance signal, partner ecosystem, champion enablement, messaging calibration, and conversion architecture. Not a consultant's checklist. A diagnostic built from auditing dozens of DevTools sites and tracking which GTM gaps correlate with stalled enterprise pipeline.

Who reads it
Founders and PMMs at DevTools companies navigating the PLG-to-enterprise transition. Product marketing leaders who've inherited a developer-first site that wasn't designed for procurement cycles. Revenue teams watching qualified pipeline stall at the website stage.

What you get
Weekly teardowns with ERG scores, documented gaps, and ranked fixes. No generic GTM advice. No "here are five things to improve." Every issue is a company-specific diagnostic — the kind of analysis that would take a consultant two weeks to produce.

The pattern across all of them: the product is ahead of the GTM surface.
